1.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
1.kj: add, apply, appoint, ascribe, assign, [idiom] avenge, [idiom] be (healed), bestow, bring (forth, hither), cast, cause, charge, come, commit, consider, count, [phrase] cry, deliver

1.gl: properly, to come forth to, i.e. appear or exist; transitively, to attain, i.e. find or acquire; figuratively, to occur, meet or be present
1.kj: [phrase] be able, befall, being, catch, [idiom] certainly, (cause to) come (on, to, to hand), deliver, be enough (cause to) find(-ing, occasion, out), get (hold upon), [idiom] have

1.gl: who? (occasionally, by a peculiar idiom, of things); also (indefinitely) whoever; often used in oblique construction with prefix or suffix
1.kj: any (man), [idiom] he, [idiom] him, [phrase] O that! what, which, who(-m, -se, -soever), [phrase] would to God.
1.dv: an interrogative pronoun of persons, as H4100 (מָה) is of things,

1.gl: to kiss, literally or figuratively (touch); also (as a mode of attachment), to equip with weapons
1.dv: a primitive root (identical with H5400 (נָשַׂק), through the idea of fastening up; compare H2388 (חָזַק), H2836 (חָשַׁק));

1.gl: a brother (used in the widest sense of literal relationship and metaphorical affinity or resemblance (like father))
1.kj: another, brother(-ly); kindred, like, other. Compare also the proper names beginning with 'Ah-' or 'Ahi-'.

1.gl: properly, separate by awall, i.e. outside, outdoors
1.kj: abroad, field, forth, highway, more, out(-side, -ward), street, without.
1.dv: or (shortened) חֻץ; (both forms feminine in the plural) from an unused root meaning to sever;

2.gl: to go or come (in a wide variety of applications)
2.kj: abide, apply, attain, [idiom] be, befall, [phrase] besiege, bring (forth, in, into, to pass), call, carry, [idiom] certainly, (cause, let, thing for) to come (against, in, out, upo

2.gl: a house (in the greatest variation of applications, especially family, etc.)
2.kj: court, daughter, door, [phrase] dungeon, family, [phrase] forth of, [idiom] great as would contain, hangings, home(born), (winter) house(-hold), inside(-ward), palace, place, [phra

2.gl: to drive forth (a person, an animal or chariot), i.e. lead, carry away; reflexively, to proceed (i.e. impel or guide oneself); also (from the panting induced by effort), to sigh
2.kj: acquaint, bring (away), carry away, drive (away), lead (away, forth), (be) guide, lead (away, forth).

2.gl: properly, to goad, i.e. (by implication) to teach (the rod being an Oriental incentive)
2.kj: (un-) accustomed, [idiom] diligently, expert, instruct, learn, skilful, teach(-er, -ing).

2.gl: to quaff, i.e. (causatively) to irrigate or furnish apotion to
2.kj: cause to (give, give to, let, make to) drink, drown, moisten, water. See H7937 (שָׁכַר), H8354 (שָׁתָה).

2.gl: a mother (as the bond of the family); in a wide sense (both literally and figuratively (like father))

3.gl: the head (as most easily shaken), whether literal or figurative (in many applications, of place, time, rank, itc.)
3.kj: band, beginning, captain, chapiter, chief(-est place, man, things), company, end, [idiom] every (man), excellent, first, forefront, (be-)head, height, (on) high(-est part, (priest)
3.dv: from an unused root apparently meaning to shake;

3.gl: the bottom (as depressed); only adverbially, below (often with prepositional prefix underneath), in lieu of, etc.
3.kj: as, beneath, [idiom] flat, in(-stead), (same) place (where...is), room, for...sake, stead of, under, [idiom] unto, [idiom] when...was mine, whereas, (where-) fore, with.

3.gl: properly, dark (as enveloped), i.e. the north; hence (by orientation), the left hand
3.dv: or שְׂמֹאל; a primitive word (rather perhaps from the same as H8071 (שִׂמְלָה) (by insertion of the aleph) through the idea of wrapping up);

3.gl: the right hand or side (leg, eye) of a person or other object (as the stronger and more dexterous); locally, the south
to clasp (the hands or in embrace)

4.gl: properly, interrogative what? (including how? why? when?); but also exclamation, what! (including how!), or indefinitely what (including whatever, and even relatively, that which); often used with prefixes in various adv
4.kj: how (long, oft, (-soever)), (no-) thing, what (end, good, purpose, thing), whereby(-fore, -in, -to, -with), (for) why.
4.dv: or מַה; or מָ; or מַ; also מֶה; a primitive particle;

4.gl: to seven oneself, i.e. swear (as if by repeating a declaration seven times)
4.kj: adjure, charge (by an oath, with an oath), feed to the full (by mistake for H7646 (שָׂבַע)), take an oath, [idiom] straitly, (cause to, make to) swear.
4.dv: a primitive root; properly to be complete, but used only as a denominative from H7651 (שֶׁבַע);

4.gl: Jerushalaim or Jerushalem, the capital city of Palestine
4.dv: rarely יְרוּשָׁלַיִם; a dual (in allusion to its two main hills (the true pointing, at least of the former reading, seems to be that of H3390 (יְרוּשׁ

4.gl: a daughter (used in the same wide sense as other terms of relationship, literally and figuratively)
4.kj: apple (of the eye), branch, company, daughter, [idiom] first, [idiom] old, [phrase] owl, town, village.

4.gl: properly, to incline to; by implication (literally but rarely) to bend; figuratively, to be pleased with, desire
4.kj: [idiom] any at all, (have, take) delight, desire, favour, like, move, be (well) pleased, have pleasure, will, would.
(a-) wake(-n, up), lift up (self), [idiom] master, raise (up), stir up (self).
4.dv: a primitive root (rather identical with through the idea of opening the eyes);

5.gl: to ascend, intransitively (be high) or actively (mount); used in a great variety of senses, primary and secondary, literal and figurative
5.kj: arise (up), (cause to) ascend up, at once, break (the day) (up), bring (up), (cause to) burn, carry up, cast up, [phrase] shew, climb (up), (cause to, make to) come (up), cut off,

5.gl: to bear young; causatively, to beget; medically, to act as midwife; specifically, to show lineage

5.gl: who? (occasionally, by a peculiar idiom, of things); also (indefinitely) whoever; often used in oblique construction with prefix or suffix
5.kj: any (man), [idiom] he, [idiom] him, [phrase] O that! what, which, who(-m, -se, -soever), [phrase] would to God.
5.dv: an interrogative pronoun of persons, as H4100 (מָה) is of things,

5.gl: the bottom (as depressed); only adverbially, below (often with prepositional prefix underneath), in lieu of, etc.
5.kj: as, beneath, [idiom] flat, in(-stead), (same) place (where...is), room, for...sake, stead of, under, [idiom] unto, [idiom] when...was mine, whereas, (where-) fore, with.

5.gl: to wind tightly (as a rope), i.e. to bind; specifically, by a pledge; figuratively, to pervert, destroy; also to writhe in pain (especially of parturition)
5.kj: [idiom] at all, band, bring forth, (deal) corrupt(-ly), destroy, offend, lay to (take a) pledge, spoil, travail, [idiom] very, withhold.

5.gl: there (transferring to time) then; often thither, or thence
5.kj: in it, [phrase] thence, there (-in, [phrase] of, [phrase] out), [phrase] thither, [phrase] whither.
5.dv: a primitive particle (rather from the relative pronoun, H834 (אֲשֶׁר));

6.gl: to put (used in a great variety of applications, literal, figurative, inferentially, and elliptically)
6.kj: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring, call (a name), care, cast in, change, charge, commit, consider, convey, determine, [phrase] disguise, dispose, do, get, give, heap up, hold, imput

6.gl: the heart; also used (figuratively) very widely for the feelings, the will and even the intellect; likewise for the centre of anything
6.kj: [phrase] care for, comfortably, consent, [idiom] considered, courag(-eous), friend(-ly), ((broken-), (hard-), (merry-), (stiff-), (stout-), double) heart(-ed), [idiom] heed, [idiom
churlish, cruel, grievous, hard((-hearted), thing), heavy, [phrase] impudent, obstinate, prevailed, rough(-ly), sore, sorrowful, stiff(necked), stubborn, [phrase] in trouble.

6.gl: the arm (as stretched out), or (of animals) the foreleg; figuratively, force
6.kj: arm, [phrase] help, mighty, power, shoulder, strength.
6.dv: or (shortened) זְרֹעַ; and (feminine) זְרוֹעָה; or זְרֹעָה; from H2232 (זָרַע);

6.gl: a live coal; by analogy lightning; figuratively, an arrow, (as flashing through the air); specifically, fever
6.kj: arrow, (burning) coal, burning heat, [phrase] spark, hot thunderbolt.

6.gl: death (natural or violent); concretely, the dead, their place or state (hades); figuratively, pestilence, ruin

7.gl: to be able, literally (can, could) or morally (may, might)
7.kj: be able, any at all (ways), attain, can (away with, (-not)), could, endure, might, overcome, have power, prevail, still, suffer.

7.gl: water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen
7.dv: dual of a primitive noun (but used in a singular sense);

8.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

8.kj: how (long, oft, (-soever)), (no-) thing, what (end, good, purpose, thing), whereby(-fore, -in, -to, -with), (for) why.
8.dv: or מַה; or מָ; or מַ; also מֶה; a primitive particle;

8.gl: perhaps properly, to arrange; but used figuratively (of words), to speak; rarely (in a destructive sense) to subdue
8.kj: answer, appoint, bid, command, commune, declare, destroy, give, name, promise, pronounce, rehearse, say, speak, be spokesman, subdue, talk, teach, tell, think, use (entreaties), ut

8.gl: a non-entity; generally used as a negative particle
8.kj: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without.
8.dv: as if from a primitive root meaning to be nothing or not exist;

8.gl: abbreviated, i.e. diminutive, literally (in quantity, size or number) or figuratively (in age or importance)
8.kj: least, less(-er), little (one), small(-est, one, quantity, thing), young(-er, -est).

9.kj: adversary, assault, beset, besiege, bind (up), cast, distress, fashion, fortify, inclose, lay siege, put up in bags.
(begin to) build(-er), obtain children, make, repair, set (up), [idiom] surely.

9.dv: or לֻחַ; from a primitive root;

9.gl: a wall; hence, a fortress or a hamlet
something swinging, i.e. the valve of adoor

9.dv: feminine active participle of an unused root apparently meaning to join;

14.kj: also, and, either, if, at the least, [idiom] nor, or, otherwise, then, whether.

14.gl: (figuratively) to love; by implication, a love-token, lover, friend; specifically an uncle

14.gl: splendor (as conspicuous); also a gazelle (as beautiful)

14.gl: to bolt, i.e. figuratively, to flee suddenly
14.kj: chase (away); drive away, fain, flee (away), put to flight, make haste, reach, run away, shoot.

14.gl: a mountain or range of hills (sometimes used figuratively)
